node.data: {"M695":{"lit":"քր<lb xml:id=\"l103915800\" facs=\"#z103915800\" n=\"15\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>իստոնէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103915799","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103915799","n":"14"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-301b"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե"},"M6712":{"lit":"քրիստոնէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104385656","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104385656","n":"24"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-124b"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե"},"M2176":{"lit":"քրիստո<lb xml:id=\"l104149125\" facs=\"#z104149125\" n=\"8\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104149124","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104149124","n":"7"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"2176-081b"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե"}}

{"M8376":{"lit":"քրիստոնէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z104232735","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104232735","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-017b"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե."},"V1294":{"lit":"քրիստո<lb xml:id=\"l104423864\" facs=\"#z104423864\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z104423863","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104423863","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9097 copy"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե."},"M8375":{"lit":"քրիստոնէութ<abbr>ե<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z104015437","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104015437","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8375.0008"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե."},"M7227":{"lit":"քրիստոնէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z103959204","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103959204","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-019b"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե."},"V1108":{"lit":"քրիստո<lb xml:id=\"l104423864\" facs=\"#z104423864\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նէու<abbr>թե<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z104423863","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104423863","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9097 copy"},"n":"քրիստոնէութե."}}
